title: 5 years of josephine!
desc:
since 2021 i've had this oc of mine that is pretty much the most important to my life. thank you bunny girl for existing in my life🐇🐇🐇

also fun fact, this was made in Krita this time! it's been fun to use so far, i'll still make stuff in animate from time to time tho . i genuinely cannot stand the eraser implementation /hj
